key_insights.insight: Maintaining a healthy sex span, the ability to engage in satisfying sexual activity, is a crucial aspect of overall well-being and longevity for both men and women.
key_insights.quote: We, most men, most women, want their sex span and their health span to last as long as their lifespan.

key_insights.insight: Lifestyle factors (diet, exercise, sleep, stress reduction) are powerful influencers of sexual health, often exceeding the impact of medication.
key_insights.quote: I don't have a pill on the planet stronger than diet, exercise, sleep, and stress reduction.

key_insights.insight: In sexual medicine, either both partners' libidos should be low, or both partners' libidos should be high; if one partner has a significantly higher libido than the other, it can ruin the relationship
key_insights.quote: In sexual medicine, either leave both libidos low or raise them both, but don't raise one or the other. It's a setup for disaster.

key_insights.insight: ED can be a harbinger of cardiovascular disease; if a man gets ED, there is a 15% chance they will have a heart attack or stroke within 7 years.
key_insights.quote: If a man comes into my office today, 15% of them will have a heart attack or a stroke within seven years. The day they get ED, 15% will have a heart attack or a stroke within seven years. It's the first sign.

key_insights.insight: Daily Cialis helps to reverse erectile dysfunction by strengthening penile tissue and protecting the endothelium lining of the blood vessels, unlike Viagra which just masks the problem
key_insights.quote: Daily Cialis, in my opinion, is one of the few things that helps cure ED. If you look at studies and you look at a penile tissue and we biopsy the tissue and then you biopsy three months later on daily Cialis, it physically gets stronger.

key_insights.insight: Women create more testosterone than any other hormone in their bodies and when replaced after depleting, significantly improves their libido.
key_insights.quote: So women make more testosterone than any other hormone in their body...If you give a woman back her testosterone, many of these women see a significant improvement in their libido.

key_insights.insight: Local vaginal estrogen therapy in postmenopausal women decreases the risk of UTIs and pain with intercourse, making sex enjoyable again.
key_insights.quote: Local vaginal estrogen therapy is very important. Decreases this risk of UTI, decreases pain with intercourse, so very important.

key_insights.insight: Obesity significantly drops testosterone levels because fat cells convert testosterone into estrogen; losing 10% or 15% of your body weight can increase testosterone.
key_insights.quote: If you lose 10% of your body weight, you can actually gain 85 nanogram per deciliter in serum testosterone. If you lose 15% of your body weight, you can actually gain 250 ng per dL in serum 2.

actionable_advice.advice: If experiencing psychogenic ED, consider daily Cialis to break the anxiety cycle.
actionable_advice.how_to: Consult a doctor for a prescription and consider using discount programs like GoodRx to reduce the cost. The goal is to show that 'everything is perfect again.'

actionable_advice.advice: If facing relationship issues that affect libido, prioritize time and open communication with your partner.
actionable_advice.how_to: Schedule dedicated time for connection, initiate open dialogue about concerns, and address underlying relationship problems with a sex therapist.

actionable_advice.advice: Adopt a Mediterranean diet to improve endothelial function and erectile function.
actionable_advice.how_to: Focus on whole grains, legumes, fruits, vegetables, fish, and limit red meat and sweets to once a month. Prioritize anti-inflammatory foods.

actionable_advice.advice: Exercise 40 minutes, 4 times a week for 6 months.
actionable_advice.how_to: Get your heart rate up and significantly improved erectile function

actionable_advice.advice: Seek help, talk to your doctor about sexual dysfunction.
actionable_advice.how_to: Tell your doctor you suffer from sexual dysfunction, because there are excellent treatment options

memorable_stories: The doctor shares a story about a woman who complained that her husband's ED treatment ruined their relationship by increasing his libido while hers remained low.
The doctor recounts having to explain and demonstrate a penile implant to airport security.
contrarian_claims: Testosterone is not just for men; it is a crucial hormone for women and can significantly improve their quality of life.
Daily Cialis, unlike Viagra, can potentially cure ED by strengthening penile tissue, protecting the endothelium, and improving endothelial function protection.
Taking testosterone does not increase the risk of cardiovascular events.

ED should be seen as a gateway to men's overall health as men are more likely to seek medical attention for ED and can be screened for other underlying health conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Sex & Infertility Expert: You Need To Grow Your Sex Span! This Is Killing Your Fertility! This Daily Habit Transforms Your Sex Life!
